calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-09-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: RESPONDENTS MARCUS DILAURO AND DAVID HOPINGS BOTH APPEAR IN PROPRIA PERSONA;
THERE IS NO APPEARANCE THIS DAY BY APPELLANT MR. MANUBHAI T. PATEL; MR. DEVENDRA PATEL, THE SON OF APPELLANT MANUBHAI T. PATEL, APPEARS AND INFORMS THE COURT THE APPELLANT IS ELDERLY AND CANNOT BE PRESENT.

OFF THE RECORD, THE COURT HEARS TESTIMONY BY BOTH SIDES AND RECEIVES, READS AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED THIS DAY; AFTER HEARING ALL ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED IN THE MATTER AND AFTER REVIEWING AND DISCUSSING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IN THE CAUSE, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. THE COURT INFORMS BOTH SIDES THEY WILL BE NOTIFIED BY MAIL; ALL EXHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE PARTIES.

JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA
